name: end-of-your-world
description: Adyashanti's 'The End of Your World: Uncensored Straight Talk on the Nature of Enlightenment' — a direct guide to spiritual awakening and the integration that follows, addressing the common traps and delusions on the path.
useCase: Navigate the spiritual awakening process, recognize common delusions and spiritual ego, and integrate realization into everyday life.
knownRisks: Advanced spiritual teaching — may not be accessible to those new to the path
Direct and uncompromising — Adyashanti does not offer comfort or reassurance
Potential for misinterpretation — teachings on 'no-self' can be confused with nihilism
